clinical_notes: Adult patient with productive cough, fever, and crackles on the right base. Chest imaging ordered; pneumonia, unspecified organism. Two-view chest x-ray performed.
policy: Aetna prior authorization policy for lower respiratory infections. Pneumonia, unspecified organism is coded J18.9 under ICD-10-CM. A two-view chest x-ray is CPT 71046; single-view is CPT 71045. Imaging must be medically necessary.

clinical_notes: Patient with chronic right knee pain and stiffness, imaging consistent with osteoarthritis. MRI of the right knee without contrast requested.
policy: Cigna policy for knee complaints. MRI of the knee without contrast is CPT 73721. Primary osteoarthritis of the right knee is ICD-10-CM M17.11; left knee is M17.12.

clinical_notes: Type 2 diabetes mellitus without complications, routine follow-up. Hemoglobin A1c laboratory test ordered.
policy: UnitedHealthcare policy for diabetes management. Type 2 diabetes mellitus without complications is ICD-10-CM E11.9. Hemoglobin A1c (glycated hemoglobin) testing is CPT 83036.
